name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl combine lime juice, mustard, Jalapeno and garlic; whisk in olive oil.
2. Add chicken; cover and marinate in fridge 30 minutes to 2 hours.
3. In a medium bowl, combine minced jalapenos, garlic, onion, chopped tomato, salt and cilantro.
4. Grill or broil chicken for 6 to 8 minutes, turning once, until heated through.
5. Keep warm. Wrap tortillas in foil; place in oven preheated to 400°F for 5 minutes until warmed through.
6. Slice chicken lengthwise into 1/4 inch thick slices.
7. Place sliced chicken on warmed tortillas, top with pico de gallo, shredded iceberg lettuce and guacamole if desired.
8. Fold up bottom edge; fold in sides.
